title: The Old One draws cards equal to cards returned

card.rawText: When summoned, return all cards aside from this card on the field back to their original owner's deck. All players then shuffle and draw the same number of cards they sent to their deck.

effect.value: Shuffle and draw same number sent to deck

plan.title: The Old One draws cards equal to cards returned
plan.summary: After The Old One returns field cards to decks, verify each player draws the same number they sent.

notes: Cards were returned by The Old One.
All players shuffle and draw the same number of cards they sent to deck.

steps: Resolve The Old One return count.
Shuffle and draw equal cards for each player.
Verify variable draw route is represented.
manualVerification: Verify against card text: When summoned, return all cards aside from this card on the field back to their original owner's deck. All players then shuffle and draw the same number of cards they sent to their deck.
riskNotes: A red result marks missing variable draw follow-up support for The Old One.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_074_the_old_one-074-e02 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
